scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:frontend && npm --prefix desktop run build
scripts.build:desktop:win: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'win32') { console.error('build:desktop:win must run on Windows because the PyInstaller backend sidecar is platform-specific. Use the GitHub Actions Windows Desktop Package workflow.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend:desktop && npm --prefix desktop run dist:win
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:frontend && npm --prefix desktop run dev
